narratives.label: Iconic Heritage & 36mm Sizing
narratives.description: Collectors and writers discuss the brand's historic legacy alongside practical sizing advice for classic 36mm references.

narratives.label: Professional Sea & Air Watches
narratives.description: Retailers highlight heavy-duty professional models - Submariner Date, Yacht-Master II, GMT-Master II - built for extreme durability.

narratives.label: Vintage Datejust Classics
narratives.description: Enthusiasts spotlight rare vintage Datejust models, especially classic Sigma dials and 1970s two-tone configurations.

narratives.label: Datejust 41 Modern Releases
narratives.description: Creators showcase current Datejust 41 models - green ombre dials, fluted bezels - via official pre-owned purchase programs.

narratives.label: Oyster Perpetual 36 Showcases
narratives.description: Sellers recommend the colorful, technicolor Jubilee-motif Oyster Perpetual 36 as an entry point into the brand.

posts.description: A "his & hers" couples Datejust set - no dealer pitch, pure styling content. Single biggest post of the entire pull.
Boutique in-stock post: Datejust 41 "available in every dial" (Leeds boutique, call-to-book).
Dealer listing for a his-and-hers factory Datejust pair, complete with box and papers.

narratives.label: Steel vs. Gold Nautilus Valuations
narratives.description: Creators debate market values and the premium pricing of steel sports references like the iconic 5711.

narratives.label: Elitist Complications & Collaborations
narratives.description: Creators explain why ultra-wealthy buyers favor high-complication annual calendars and rare co-branded dials.

narratives.label: High Horology Masterpieces
narratives.description: Ultra-complex pieces like the Sky Moon Tourbillon 6002R are showcased to highlight extreme artisanal craft.

narratives.label: Vintage Models & Ellipse Classics
narratives.description: Classic vintage timepieces - the Golden Ellipse ref. 3738, the 1976 Onyx - draw dedicated collector attention.

narratives.label: Billionaire Wristwear & Status
narratives.description: Creators debate the watch choices of billionaires and heirs, contrasting sports models with platinum dress watches.

posts.description: Pure aesthetic-reaction clip on a rose-gold Nautilus - caption is just admiration, nothing else.
Direct comparison bait: 5711/1R vs. 5712R, "which one would you wear?"
A steel 5711/1A blue-dial Nautilus framed as "the world's most beautiful watch."

narratives.label: Skeleton Dials & Frosted Gold
narratives.description: Bold aesthetics - double balance wheels, rainbow bezels, skeleton dials, frosted rose gold - dominate the conversation.

narratives.label: High Complication Showcase
narratives.description: Engineering marvels like the Perpetual Calendar and Concept GMT Tourbillon are the focus of dedicated craft content.

narratives.label: Retail Listings & Unboxings
narratives.description: Sellers and collectors share fresh stock, store locations and unboxing detail for new Royal Oak chronographs.

narratives.label: Brand Heritage & Anniversaries
narratives.description: The 1972 launch of the steel Royal Oak and its 50th-anniversary editions are a recurring reference point.

narratives.label: Vintage Elegance & Complications
narratives.description: Rare vintage pieces - the Jules Audemars Extra-Thin, the Disco Volante, yellow gold moonphases - surface regularly.

posts.description: Unboxing of a Royal Oak Chronograph 41mm - AP's single biggest post of the pull.
Dealer "new arrival" post: a 2017 Royal Oak 41mm with full box and papers.
Craftsmanship showcase of the Royal Oak Skeleton Openworked ref. 15305ST.

narratives.label: Limited Edition Technical Chronographs
narratives.description: Highly complex limited-edition pieces with specialized mechanical complications for motorsport and soccer dominate volume.

narratives.label: High Value Buying & Lifestyle
narratives.description: Creators discuss the prestige, extreme pricing and security risk of owning multi-hundred-thousand-dollar timepieces.

narratives.label: Celebrity Collections & Collaborations
narratives.description: Ultra-expensive custom pieces worn by figures like Anant Ambani and Rafael Nadal get dedicated spotlight content.

narratives.label: Secondary Market Value Evaluations
narratives.description: Creators track resale pricing and technical detail on models endorsed by racing drivers and musicians.

narratives.label: Formula One Driver Associations
narratives.description: F1 drivers - Lando Norris, Charles Leclerc - wearing RM pieces during championship and podium moments.

posts.description: A musician (J Balvin) shown wearing a one-of-one Sapphire Blue Tourbillon - third-party creator content, not RM-owned.
Third-party retelling of the Stallone RM 52-01 "Tourbillon Skull" auction story.
A creator shown wearing the RM UP-01 Ferrari, noted as a nearly $2M piece.

narratives.label: Diver 300M Diving Heritage
narratives.description: Enthusiasts showcase the engineering and robust utility of the Seamaster Diver line, heavily linked to Bond heritage.

narratives.label: Five-Watch Collection Curation
narratives.description: Creators build and pitch ideal five-watch collections built around classic Omega references for every occasion.

narratives.label: Celebrity & Olympic Ambassadorship
narratives.description: Daniel Craig, George Clooney and Olympic athletes surface regularly wearing Omega pieces in creator content.

narratives.label: Styling & Maintenance Tips
narratives.description: Reviews and short episodes cover how to buy, style, care for and verify authenticity of legacy pieces.

posts.description: A Bond-themed presentation box tied to a 007 film anniversary - "if Q gives you a box like that..."
The Moonswatch "Moonshine Gold" colorway drop, styled as a standout addition to the line.
Unboxing of the Speedmaster "Snoopy" edition - box, loupe and case detail.
